name: BW LPG Limited
summary: BW LPG Limited, an investment holding company, engages in shipowning and chartering activities worldwide. It operates through three segments: Very Large Gas Carriers (VLGCs), Large Gas Carriers (LGCs), and Product Services. The company is involved in the transportation of liquefied petroleum gas to oil companies, and trading and utility companies; and product trading and delivery activities. As of February 28, 2020, it had a fleet of 47 vessels, including 35 owned VLGCs, 10 chartered VLGCs, and 2 owned and operated VLGCs by a joint venture with a total carrying capacity of approximately 3 million cubic meters. The company was formerly known as BW Gas LPG Holding Limited and changed its name to BW LPG Limited in September 2013. BW LPG Limited was founded in 1935 and is headquartered in Singapore.
